404.title: Page Not Found
404.description: Sorry, the page you are looking for might have been moved, deleted, or never existed in the MANGO system.

500.title: Server Error
500.description: An internal system error has occurred. Our technical team is working to fix it as soon as possible.

403.title: Access Denied
403.description: You do not have the required permissions to access this page or resource.

VerifyEmailPage.title: Verify Your Email
VerifyEmailPage.description: Thanks for signing up! Before getting started, could you verify your email address by clicking on the link we just emailed to you? If you didn't receive the email, we will gladly send you another.
VerifyEmailPage.resent_success: A new verification link has been sent to the email address you provided during registration.

OnboardingPage.title: Complete UMKM Profile
OnboardingPage.subtitle: Just a few more steps to activate your business account.
OnboardingPage.error: Failed to save data. Please try again.

DashboardCommon.try_adjusting_search_filter: Try adjusting your search or filter.

AdminUsersPage.title: User Management
AdminUsersPage.subtitle: Central authority to control all accounts within the MANGO ecosystem.
AdminUsersPage.found_search: {count} user{count, plural, one {} other {s}} found for "{search}"
AdminUsersPage.found_role: {count} user{count, plural, one {} other {s}} found with role "{role}"
AdminUsersPage.found_search_role: {count} user{count, plural, one {} other {s}} found for "{search}" with role "{role}"
AdminUsersPage.modal_create_desc: Register a new user to the system.
AdminUsersPage.delete_desc: This user's access will be completely revoked from the system. This action cannot be undone.

RbacPage.title: RBAC Security
RbacPage.subtitle: Manage roles, permissions, and user access from one control surface.
RbacPage.roles_desc: Create and maintain authority groups for users.
RbacPage.permissions_desc: Register granular access keys used by roles.
RbacPage.members_desc: Assign roles to users and review current access.
RbacPage.note: Changes to roles and permissions can affect active users immediately. Review member access after updating RBAC rules.

RbacRolesPage.title: Role Management
RbacRolesPage.subtitle: Manage RBAC roles and their bound permission sets.
RbacRolesPage.found_search: {count} role{count, plural, one {} other {s}} found for "{search}"
RbacRolesPage.modal_desc: Role identifiers are normalized to lowercase underscores.
RbacRolesPage.warning: Role changes affect every user assigned to this role.
RbacRolesPage.name: Role Name
RbacRolesPage.delete_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this role? Users assigned to it may lose access.

RbacPermissionsPage.title: Permission Matrix
RbacPermissionsPage.subtitle: Register and manage atomic permissions used by RBAC roles.
RbacPermissionsPage.found_search: {count} permission{count, plural, one {} other {s}} found for "{search}"
RbacPermissionsPage.modal_desc: Use a clear action name, such as manage users.
RbacPermissionsPage.warning: Permission changes can immediately change access for linked roles.
RbacPermissionsPage.name: Permission Name
RbacPermissionsPage.delete_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this permission? Roles using it may lose access.

RbacMembersPage.title: Member Access
RbacMembersPage.subtitle: Assign RBAC roles to users and review their current authority.
RbacMembersPage.found_search: {count} member{count, plural, one {} other {s}} found for "{search}"
